<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-SCHEMA$ = N; N; N; N; N; A; B;
$FNC-BRANCH$ = Top Path Stats; Bottom Path Stats
$FNC-COST$ = 900; 125; 1337; 6500; 24000; 60001; 48000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 1400; 600; 1250; 7500; 22000; 63500; 48000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Upgraded Rig; Shady Business; Teleportation Tech; 5th Gen I9 3260590327; Overclock; Rug Pull
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 116572141213630; 84772480553742; 73779458293742; 71327152036764; 78547724037844; 1055790781734
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="15" |Neutral Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Synapses !! Range !! Hologram EV !! Slowness !! Clone Cost !! Hologram Lifetime !! Wire Fraud !! Unit Limit !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
|0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 0 || 0.3 || 1 || 11 || 0.45 || 12.5% || N/A || N/A || 12.5% || 1,000 || $DPS$ || {{Money|N/A}}
|-
|1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 0 || 0.3 || 1 || 12.5 || 0.45 || 15% || N/A || N/A || 12.5% || 1,000 || $DPS$ || {{Money|N/A}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 0 || 0.3 || 2 || 14 || 0.55 || 15% || N/A || N/A || 15% || 1,000 || $DPS$ || {{Money|N/A}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 10 || 0.3 || 2 || 15 || 0.625 || 17.5% || 20% || 25 || 15% || 1,000 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20 || 0.3 || 3 || 16 || 0.725 || 20% || 20% || 25 || 20% || 1,000 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="15" |Top Path Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Synapses !! Range !! Hologram EV !! Slowness !! Clone Cost !! Hologram Lifetime !! Wire Fraud !! Unit Limit !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 25 || 0.1 || 3 || 18.5 || 0.825 || 15% || 15% || 30 || 15% || 1,000 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="15" |Bottom Path Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Synapses !! Range !! Hologram EV !! Slowness !! Clone Cost !! Hologram Lifetime !! Wire Fraud !! Unit Limit !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20 || 0.3 || 4 || 21 || 0.725 || 22.5% || 75% || 120 || 25% || 1,000 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="16" |Neutral Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Synapses !! Range !! Hologram EV !! Slowness !! Clone Cost !! Hologram Lifetime !! Wire Fraud !! Unit Limit !! Unit Send Cooldown !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 0.8 || 1 || 11 || 0.6 || 0% || N/A || N/A || N/A || 1,000 || 0.1 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 4 || 0.5 || 2 || 14 || 0.6 || 0% || N/A || N/A || 7.5% || 1,000 || 0.1 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 6 || 0.5 || 2 || 14 || 0.65 || 15% || N/A || N/A || 10% || 1,000 || 0.1 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20 || 0.5 || 2 || 15 || 0.725 || 15% || 35% || 60 || 10% || 1,000 || 0.1 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20 || 0.3 || 2 || 16 || 0.825 || 20% || 30% || 75 || 12.5% || 1,000 || 0.1 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="16" |Top Path Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Synapses !! Range !! Hologram EV !! Slowness !! Clone Cost !! Hologram Lifetime !! Wire Fraud !! Unit Limit !! Unit Send Cooldown !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 15 || 0.1 || 4 || 18.5 || 0.9 || 15% || 30% || 75 || 12.5% || 1,000 || 0.1 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="16" |Bottom Path Stats
|-
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Synapses !! Range !! Hologram EV !! Slowness !! Clone Cost !! Hologram Lifetime !! Wire Fraud !! Unit Limit !! Unit Send Cooldown !! DPS !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 18 || 0.3 || 3 || 21 || 0.825 || 25% || 25% || 120 || 20% || 1,000 || 0.1 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
